text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fall—the season where the cooking aficionados
among the academy students put their chef hats
on...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: I'm going to make a huge omelet rice!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I'll cook it with lots of love and dish it up for
everyone to enjoy. ♪

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I'll be baking an Apfelstrudel—a pastry dish with
apples and nuts.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
But the most important part to making a strudel is
the whipped cream...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
It can't be too sweet or too firm... In order to
create a smooth consistency, it must be mixed
with impeccable precision!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
One of my fans gave me the recipe, and I plan to
recreate it perfectly.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I'll try really hard to make sure it turns out
delicious!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Today, I'll be making a lovely cream stew.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
It's simmering away at the moment, so please be
patient, okay? ♪

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I went to see how the kitchen's doing. Everything
looked so delicious! ♪

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Sigh... But is this really fair? I mean, we get to be the testers, the best role of all.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Spe... They've entrusted us with this very important position.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: So we must live up to that role with all our might!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
You're right! Let's chow down and meet their
expectations!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fall—the season where the foodies among the
students put their stomachs to the test...
